zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay於1175年出生在英國諾福爾可喬加時，她的父親William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay30歲，母親Beatrix Pierrepont13歲。她於大約1195年與Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1214年12月12日之前在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay was born in 1175, in Wormegay, Norfolk, England, her father, William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay, was 30 and her mother, Beatrix Pierrepont, was 13. She married Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay about 1195. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 12 December 1214, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay est née en 1175, à Wormegay, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Pierrepont, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay environ 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant 12 décembre 1214, dans sa ville natale.

de.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: Newton Saint Faith, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay 1175 in Wormegay, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay 30 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Pierrepont 13. Sie hat um 1195 Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb vor 12. Dezember 1214 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay è nata il nel 1175 nel Wormegay, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Pierrepont, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay circa 1195. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 12 dicembre 1214, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegayが1175年にイギリスノーフォルクウオルメガイで生まれた時，父William de Warenne Lord of Wormegayは30歳，母Beatrix Pierrepontは13歳であった。約1195年にDuon Bardolf Baron of Wormegayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1214年12月12日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뉴턴 세인트 파이스
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay(이)가 1175년 영국 노르폴크 워메가이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Pierrepont(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1195년 Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 12월 12일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay nasceu em 1175, em Wormegay, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Pierrepont, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay aproximadamente 1195. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu antes 12 de dezembro de 1214, em sua cidade natal.

ru.Burgh, Cawston & Newton, Norfolk, Englan: нютон сеинт феит, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Warenne Lady of Wormegay родилась в 1175 г. в местности вормегеи, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Warenne Lord of Wormegay было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Pierrepont, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Duon Bardolf Baron of Wormegay около 1195 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 12 декабрь 1214 г. в её родном городе.
